title: Messaging App
description:
Hello, everyone!

This is an idea for a messaging app I recently created.

In recent months, I've used a number of messaging applications, and many of them lack fundamental user experience.

Please let me know what you think!

Overview

Hello, everyone!

This is an idea for a messaging app I recently created.

In recent months, I've used a number of messaging applications, and many of them lack fundamental user experience.

Please let me know what you think!
